'''Low'n''' was a populous [[Planet/Legends|world]] in the [[Romintine sector/Legends|Romintine sector]] of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]. It was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Lowen]].

==History==
The [[Lowen]] [[Saboteur/Legends|saboteur]] [[Ostan Atur]] was born on Low'n, where she grew up surrounded by [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]] and [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]]. Deciding to become a saboteur, she learned a great deal about technology by frequenting Low'n [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceports]] and tech shops.<ref name="AJ10" />
